Thought 6: Based on the evidence, Wade has a direct personal motive (protecting his sister from Hugo's stalking), was present at the campground on the night of the murder, and was seen practicing strikes with his climbing axe, which could be the murder weapon. Salvador has a financial/drug-related motive and owns handaxes, but there is no evidence placing him at the crime scene. Therefore, Wade is the most likely murderer.
